双手合十)，毕竟这位才是属于我们的女主"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721437876,"group_id":"7296670623839816740","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101944711572"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296670623839816740","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4203936e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14203,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7392995433161769752","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书冷清秋这个锚点角色设置的很好，不管原女主们和原男主多么亲切，互动多么暧昧，你都不会有反派男主被绿的感觉(毕竟野花那有家花香)，就是很舒服，而且反派男女主都很专情，总是是一部摒弃了传统反派文弊端的佳作"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721389843,"group_id":"7296670623839816740","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5zn49q4xtFtGekZgrruqbk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"101944711572","user_name":"爱吃生命水的周老师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101944711572","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296670623839816740","book_info":{"abstract":"顾言穿越书中，成为了顶级富二代反派。
只是这个反派却是书中第一号女主沈婉儿的头号舔狗。
在后续也不出意外的成了主角装逼打脸的工具人，最后落得个家破人亡的下场。
正巧觉醒【宇宙纯爱系统】，只要行纯爱之事就能获得积分。
为了改变结局，顾言当即立断选择书中最大反派——冷清秋报团取暖。
...........
我叫冷清秋。
为了找到当年杀害我父母的凶手，我不惜故意弄瞎双眼让所有人都对我放下戒心。
就在我按照初定计划暗中积攒力量资本的时候，一个男人走进了我的世界里。
"冷冷、清清、秋秋，你喜欢我喊你哪个?“
哪个都不喜欢，你最好赶紧走！
“为什么不说话? 那我喊你老婆宝宝好不好?”
冷清秋表示，这个男人！真的很烦！
(牛头纯爱战士+单女主+真纯爱+1V1)","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-pic/4a220de7ae4716b7d38805a990b751d0","author":"牛头人战士","author_id":"","book_id":"7296670623839816740","book_name":"我纯爱，让冷艳盲人反派做我老婆","book_short_name":"暗黑之恋","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7297073160984527399","read_count":"40564","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1164595"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"456","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,反派,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1ad8d3f7aa1d3fb0fa69f35a637b8d59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285133&x-signature=VcPw2a2CbkCJvQdgr8dlWxd5%2B1w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4319298519055533","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":
